final:
module top_module(input I, output O);// Declare output enable signal
    wire obf_oe = 1'b1; // Set output enable to 1

    // Replace the unknown module with a simple buffer implementation
    assign O = obf_oe ? I : 1'bz; // Output I when obf_oe is high, otherwise high-impedance (tri-state)
endmodule
